description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker predominantly blue in color, featuring a white rubber sole and white laces. The shoe has a prominent Velcro strap at the ankle, with the word 'CONVERSE' in bold yellow letters on the outer side. The side panels display a white star and chevron logo, characteristic of Converse's design. The back of the shoe includes a yellow pull tab and a white heel patch with 'ALL STAR' branding. The upper material appears to be synthetic or canvas, with visible stitching and some signs of wear, especially around the strap and heel. The overall build suggests comfort and support for urban activities, with a sturdy yet flexible structure.
description: A blue high-top Converse sneaker with a white sole, white laces, and a yellow-branded Velcro strap. Features include a star logo, yellow pull tab, and visible signs of light wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue toe box, white laces, and the Velcro strap with the Converse label on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the white star and chevron logo, the full length of the Velcro strap, and the shoe's overall profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the yellow pull tab, white heel patch with 'ALL STAR' branding, and the padded collar.
description_view_3: Right side view features the bold yellow 'CONVERSE' branding on the strap and the shoe's side profile.
attribute_logo: White star and chevron on the side panels; 'CONVERSE' in yellow on the Velcro strap; 'ALL STAR' on the heel patch.
